programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China._x000D__x000D_

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: China 24

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder 101
programme.desc: Gabbi's luck hits a snag after reuniting with Charles David, Dean of Criminology at Williams College. She's there as a guest lecturer, but when Charles is found dead next morning an investigation begins.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: Elizabeth and Ryan
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is wonderful. After experiencing a health scare, they realised it was opportune to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: Grilled Cheese & Tomato Soup Featuring Anna Gass
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.title: Halibut Fish Tacos
programme.desc: Rachael cooks a flavourful Mexican-style dish of halibut fish tacos along with pico de gallo, while John serves up a tall glass of refreshing watermelon margaritas.
Tonight's elimination is a plant-based challenge, where contestants go head-to-head tore-create a well-known meat dish using only plant-based ingredients for their chance to secure the Top 10.

programme.title: Not So Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: Chicken Meatballs with Oatmeal
programme.desc: Rachael celebrates the Italian flag by bringing us three different pastas in three colours. She breaks down the steps to make a delicious cacio e pepe with copious amounts of cheese.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, was caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him. She agrees to help, but only once her husband is out of the house.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Old Flames, New Fire
programme.desc: When her father, Michael Luck, becomes a person of interest in the death of his ex-business partner, Lisa must do whatever she can to help. This means she will need to enlist the aid of her mother, Gabbi.
From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Dancing With Spirit
programme.desc: Always game to try new things, Theresa and Kiana attend a line-dancing class in Dallas. While there, Theresa conducts an impromptu group reading that leaves several cowboys in tears.

programme.title: Flipping the Botched Facelift
programme.desc: James takes on a dying home in need of a major facelift: a 104-year-old house brought to him by a rookie flipper. With the property in dire condition, James and his team must rethink the layout.
With the Top 10 decided, it's Day One of Sweet Week and Adriano Zumbo kicks things off with a wonderfully wobbly jelly Mystery Box.
Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: Naana and Daren
programme.desc: Daren and Naana are searching for a turn-key home with a stunning ocean view. In addition, they need a location to open their dream roadside ice cream shop.

programme.title: Ramen Around Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a hearty and healthy meal for her Italian friends, combining store-bought and homemade ingredients to make flavourful, protein-rich ramen bowls.

programme.title: A Diff-occult Deal
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: Ensalada de Camarones
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a delicious Puerto Rican-style cold shrimp salad, also known as ensalada de Camarones, with avocado, corn and rice, that's perfect for serving as the weather turns warm.

programme.title: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: While she is channelling, Theresa is also challenging herself by facing her fear of heights and encouraging her daughter to move into her brand new house.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: A Diff-occult Deal
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: Tummy Talk
programme.desc: When Sarah forgets her sandwich, her rumbling tummy inadvertently starts a conversation with a Frog.

programme.title: First Aid
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to see if she can practice her first aid skills on him, but he's all fit and healthy. Instead, they go about the town making good use of Myrtle's newfound abilities.

programme.title: Bug Hotel
programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: Penguins Live in Igloos
programme.desc: Rain, hail, sunshine, and making snow giraffes! The animals chat about everything they love about their favourite seasons.

programme.title: It's time to build a sandcastle
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran go on a day-trip to the seaside to build a big sandcastle for Panda. But JoJo learns that things need not last forever to be special!

programme.title: Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: The Radio Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels decide to start their own radio show.

programme.title: The Cheese Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak.

programme.title: Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Holi Festival of Colour, India
programme.desc: Glitch takes all of the colourful powder from the Festival of Colour in Dwarka, India. Can the Go Jetters get it back?

programme.title: Avocado
programme.desc: The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: Banana
programme.desc: Banana reveals another secret about herself in the opera piece, "I've Got a Secret".

programme.title: Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: Walkie Talkie
programme.desc: The veggies are playing walkie-talkie hide-and-seek, but Evil Pea steals Carrot's walkie-talkie and uses it to trick the Veggies into getting trapped by the Corn Cobs.

programme.title: Songtime
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa‐Laa and Po enjoy Tiddlytubbies Songtime. Then it is time for Teletubbies Songtime. The Teletubbies sing solo before singing all together.

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'fox' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today, we see a red fox, a furry fox, a fast fox and a fantastic fox.

programme.title: Pongberry
programme.desc: Messy has to deliver the giant pongberry to the Pongberry Pie Festival before it goes off and releases a terrible smell in OKIDO City!

programme.title: Joist Hoist
programme.desc: There's a girder out of place on Swoppiton Bridge, and unless Nori can fix it, that bridge is coming down! Luckily, Mojo's got the tops, and Bo's got the skills to help get it done.

programme.title: Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: The Diary Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Waterspout Wipeout
programme.desc: A race between Xuli, Lars and Glitch gets serious when a tornado hits the Academy Island.

programme.title: Hotel
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo run a crazy "Hotel" with Dad as their put upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them how to compromise.

programme.title: Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Andy and the Arctic Fox
programme.desc: Andy goes to record an arctic fox hunting, but is chased by a polar bear and faces a snow storm. He finds safety with some walrus.

programme.title: Snail
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?

programme.title: The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: The Water Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels learn all about where water comes from, and their journey takes them from the sea and back to the kitchen sink and another drink of water. Wow! Water is amazing!

programme.title: The Brave Banana Badge
programme.desc: When thunder and lightning scares the squirrels, Duggee teaches them about bravery.

programme.title: Chocolate Hills, Philippines
programme.desc: Greedy Grandmaster Glitch has been gorging on chocolate and wants more! The Grimbots discover a place called the Chocolate Hills on Bohol Island in the Philippines and take him there.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Volcanic Island
programme.desc: There's trouble erupting for the Go Jetters as Glitch disturbs an underwater volcano...

programme.title: Thomas' Not So Lucky Day
programme.desc: It's Friday the 13th in Italy and Thomas tries to improve his luck by following Lorenzo and Beppe's advice on superstitions.

programme.title: Tummy Talk
programme.desc: When Sarah forgets her sandwich, her rumbling tummy inadvertently starts a conversation with a Frog.

programme.title: Moon's Exhibition
programme.desc: A trip to the art gallery unexpectedly helps Duck with the hunt for his lost toy Rhino.

programme.title: No Kissing In School
programme.desc: From feeling nervous and shy, to making a million friends! The funny animals chat about all the things they love about school.

programme.title: It's time to go to the hairdressers
programme.desc: JoJo learns how fun the hairdresser's can be when she goes with Gran Gran for a trim. After helping the hairdresser, JoJo also gets her own new style ready for Ezra's party!

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: IM ADDICTED TO NENG NASI UDUK CANS
programme.desc: After a rebellious escape from his restrictive life, Gibran crosses paths with Suci, a humble girl who sells nasi uduk. Determined to change his ways, Gibran sets out on a mission to win her heart and prove he is her dream match.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: POV Disekop-Sekop Cogan 34M Followers
programme.desc: During a chaotic fight, Echa (Zoe Abbas Jackson) and El (Cinta Brian) accidentally knock Tristan (Kevin Hillers) unconscious. Panicking and thinking he’s dead, they plan to hide the 'body' to avoid jail. But just as they are about to dump him, Tristan wakes up! Instead of being angry, Tristan who was bored with his daily routine is thrilled by the adventure and asks them to take him on a vacation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: I LEFT MY LOVE IN KEBUN JERUK
programme.desc: Sita went to Bali to visit her uncle, Pak Yusak, an orange collector known for buying crops at very low prices. Together with his son, Herdi, Pak Yusak had long dominated the orange trade in the area. Dewan, an orange farmer, fought for a price increase for the sake of fairness for the farmers, but his efforts were always rejected. At first, Sita was unaware of the conflict, but after learning about it, she chose to support Dewan. Sita's stance angered Herdi, who kicked her out.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ketemu di Mimpi is Level 34 of Kangen
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start after a breakup, Saskia (Saskia Chadwick) joins an 'open trip' where she meets Yudha (Rizky Nazar), the charming group leader. They share a romantic night stargazing in the forest, but Saskia wakes up in a hospital with a shock: the travel agency claims they have no record of anyone named Yudha

programme.title: GAK GITU KONSEPNYA MAEMUNAH
programme.desc: Maya’s (formerly Maemunah) arrogance leads to a bizarre curse: she suddenly reeks of salted fish, threatening to end her singing career! In a twist of fate, she meets Darto, a handsome salted-fish vendor. Could their meeting be the key to breaking the smelly curse and saving her voice?

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: How Magic Johnson Built a Business Empire
programme.desc: The hosts sit with Magic Johnson to discuss how he was able to make the transition from being a legendary basketball player to a successful businessman.

programme.title: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire
programme.desc: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire. Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones speaks on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fuelled his rise with the Cowboys.

programme.title: How Emmanuel Acho Reinvents Himself
programme.desc: The hosts talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, "Speakeasy."

programme.title: The CEO Behind Barstool Sports & Food52
programme.desc: Erika Ayers Badan, former chief executive of Barstool Sports and current CEO of Food52, discusses navigating turnarounds and how setbacks can fuel growth.

programme.title: Principles With Bill Belichick and Ray Dalio
programme.desc: The hosts sit for a special conversation with two titans, football coach Bill Belichick and Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio, to learn their guiding principles for success.

programme.title: The Future of Fitness With Peloton's Robin Arzón
programme.desc: Alex and Jason sit with Peloton instructor and Vice President of Fitness Programming Robin Arzón about career pivots, managing talent and how she thinks about entrepreneurship.

programme.title: Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: Ray Dalio, Founder of Bridgewater Associates
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: How to Run Your Family's $1.6 Trillion Empire
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: Theresa May and the Brutality of Politics
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: Inside Europe's Economic Crises With Christine Lagarde
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Ajay Banga on India, Migration and a Youth Jobs Time Bomb
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are "under surveillance" as we cover the latest in finance, economics and investment. Join Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: Water. Our survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking. Can technology help secure humanity's future water needs?

programme.title: Pain
programme.desc: For some, pain is excruciating and inescapable. But amid the continuing fallout of the opioid crisis, new technologies are being developed to limit and even eliminate pain.

programme.title: Next Billion
programme.desc: Soon, another billion people will be online. How will these new users embrace this technology to transform their lives, and what will it mean for the rest of the world?

programme.title: Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: Ray Dalio, Founder of Bridgewater Associates
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: How to Run Your Family's $1.6 Trillion Empire
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: Theresa May and the Brutality of Politics
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: Inside Europe's Economic Crises With Christine Lagarde
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Ajay Banga on India, Migration and a Youth Jobs Time Bomb
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: How New Magnets Could Power the Future
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Can Living Human Brain Cells Power AI?
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: The Big Business of Drilling Deep Into the Earth
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Why a Lunar Ecosystem Could Be Worth Billions
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Newsoms, California's First Couple
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California’s First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: In The Heights
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical, In the Heights. Usnavi, a New York bodega owner, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life.

programme.title: The Everyday Life Of Parallel World Pharmacy And Cosmetics
programme.desc: The Pharmacy's attracting citizens' attention, but there aren't many customers. Lotte conducts a survey to find out why.

programme.title: The Siblings And The Sea

programme.title: Let’s Go Home

programme.title: Summer Will Be Here Soon

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Neng Urut Senyummu Emang Paling Kyut
programme.desc: Bondan was fired from his job. On his way home, Bondan was riding his motorcycle in a daze until he fell off. When he got home, his mother asked him to get a massage. While Bondan was sleeping, Seruni secretly massaged his feet.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Kabur Aja Dulu Daripada Jadi Baper Mulu
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Ratu (Djihan Ranti). Ratu has a lover named Fathan. Unbeknownst to Ratu, Fathan is secretly having an affair with Ratu's best friend. One day, Ratu is shocked to discover that Fathan has cheated on her and proposed to Ratu's best friend. This leaves Ratu shocked and heartbroken.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: GASPOL
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: Duduk Tenang Rayuan Gen Z Datang
programme.desc: Cinta (Ina Marika) who was suddenly approached by a young man named Roy (Emyr Razan), he is really a Gen Z kid! Will Roy's sweet talk get through to Cinta?

programme.title: Kuwa Kuwi Cintamu Kiuw Kiuw di Hatiku
programme.desc: Deva is a man who is trying to find his true love. Deva who comes from a wealthy family, intends to find a soulmate who can sincerely love him. When Deva works as a clown entertaining children. Deva accidentally meets Nala because Nala bumps into Deva.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: HOT SHOT
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Sok Petantang Petenteng Eh Malah Cut Off Sampai Asing
programme.desc: Senja (Dosma Hazenbosch) and Irina (Amanda Khairunnisa) were walking around campus. They happened to pass by the Mapala room. There was Bara (Jihad Alfurqon), the Mapala leader who was liked by many female students on campus. Sure enough, Senja immediately fell in love the first time she saw Bara. Because she was so fascinated by Bara, Senja tripped and fell on Langit (Farhan Rasyid) who happened to be sitting there.

programme.title: Geprek Aja Terus Cintaku Sampe Ke Penghulu
programme.desc: Ojan (Masaji Wijayanto) was tricked by a thug and had to pay for 3 portions of Nadia's (Larasati Nugroho) geprek chicken. Ojan's debt was because Nadia asked him to fix her motorbike which suddenly broke down. From Nadia's conversation with her father, it turns out that Ojan also just found out that the girlfriend Ojan wanted to meet was cheating on him with Nadia's boyfriend.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: GASPOL
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, Andre and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: #FavoriteShow
programme.desc: Sam and Cat babysit two boys: one who asks a lot of questions, and another who can't stop hugging. The girls also attempt to save their favorite TV show from being cancelled and Sam finds a special way to keep the show alive.

programme.title: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: With some loose Mutagen at stake, Mikey questions Rod's siblings, the notorious and eccentric MAUDE and TODD... both of whom are trying to get their hands on some mutant blood as well. Can Mikey find Rod before it's too late?

programme.title: The Big Muck
programme.desc: Who kidnapped Rod? Where is the mutagen? Why is Rod's family so weird? Everything has led to a confrontation of Rod's dad... but even with Rod's help, can Mikey and his brothers defeat the mutant known as MUCKMAN?

programme.title: The Dirty Bubble Bass / Sheldon SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass and the Dirty Bubble team up to become Bikini Bottom's nastiest nefarious nuisance. // Plankton joins the SquarePants family in the hope of becoming closer to SpongeBob (and the secret formula).

programme.title: Sammy Suckerfish / Big League Bob
programme.desc: SpongeBob meets a magical fish. // SpongeBob cooks in the big leagues.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Tenta-Flakes / Boss Level
programme.desc: Best and Bester go on a mission to find out what gives their favourite cereal "Tenta-Flakes" such a purply taste. // Bester's outlandish ideas to make mini golf fun for the customers nearly lead to disaster, but Best saves the day.

programme.title: Stage Struck / Ball Count
programme.desc: Best's sound effects threaten to derail Bester's one chance to shine on the opening night of a Flip Flop's play. // Best and Bester's "inbestigation" into some missing golf balls escalates into a full-blown mountain rescue mission.

programme.title: Stair Wars / Enemies a la Mode
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict. // The members of the Star family each confront their own absurd rivalries.

programme.title: Lost in Couch / Pat-a-thon
programme.desc: Patrick loses the remote in the cushions, so he journeys into the couch to track it down. // Patrick hosts a telethon to raise money for snails who can't dance.

programme.title: Something Narwhal This Way Comes / C.H.U.M.S.
programme.desc: Two familiar faces from SpongeBob's past visit Bikini Bottom, but they bring a big problem along with them. // After falling down the drain, Plankton finds an unlikely ally in the sewers.

programme.title: Patrick's Coupon
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it!

programme.title: The Max of Life
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: Trojan Force
programme.desc: When Danger Force's fingerprints show up on crime scene evidence, they must break into police headquarters and wipe the prints, or their secret identities--and Danger Force itself--will be ruined.

programme.title: The Beat Goes On
programme.desc: With the return on Dr. Minyak, Henry finds himself in danger when he realizes that the evil doer has transformed his best friend, Charlotte, into a super strong being set to capture Kid Danger and Captain Man.

programme.title: Wheel and Deal / Feast or Family
programme.desc: Lana wants to win a race car ride-along with her hero, so she and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby. // When Luan must enroll in a culinary class, Dad uses it to share his passion for cooking with one of his kids.

programme.title: A Dark & Story Night / Sand Hassles
programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. // Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

programme.title: Appetite for Destruction
programme.desc: When Lily starts misbehaving at home, Mom and Dad think her new preschool friends might be the cause.

programme.title: Heart of Garbage / Near-Mint Plankton
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick must search for Squidward after the inside of his home turns into a vast garbage jungle. // In his latest scheme, Plankton disguises himself as a collectible figurine and winds up trapped in Bubble Bass' basement.

programme.title: Pardon My Wand / Stupor-stition
programme.desc: SpongeBob obtains a magician's wand and accidentally causes magical mayhem wherever he goes. // On Friday the 13th, Mr. Krabs' extreme superstitions become a disruption for everyone around him.

programme.title: My Father the Boat
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside of Pearl's new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Sea Haw / Li'l Past-cals
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a countrified variety show. // The Kelpbed Kids travel to the future to get their kicking can back.

programme.title: A Remembrance of Grand-Past
programme.desc: GrandPat shares his life stories to spoil every movie at the theater.

programme.title: Grub Snub / She's All Bat
programme.desc: When Leni and her friends start hanging out at Gus's, Lincoln and the gang start a turf war for control. // Lucy gets jealous of Lola's newfound attention after she joins the Mortician's Club.

programme.title: Much Ado About Noshing / Broadcast Blues
programme.desc: The kids help Dad track down the mystery person who left Lynn's Table a bad review online. // The Action News Team has to cater to Chandler's demands after he buys the club new equipment.

programme.title: Camped!
programme.desc: When Dad discovers that his childhood camp is closing, he decides to take the family for one final visit. // They soon uncover a map that could lead to a treasure big enough to save it and prove the existence of an old camp legend.

programme.title: Dad Reputation / Dream a Lily Dream
programme.desc: While playing in her Dad's new band, Luna is worried about her reputation if her friends see her perform. // Lisa discovers the only way to stop Lily's nightmares is to go inside her dreams and fight them herself.

programme.title: Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

programme.title: Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window.

programme.title: No Pictures, Please / Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. // SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life!

programme.title: Lighthouse Louie
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans out the boating school lighthouse, where he finds a cute but inconvenient companion.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Bean Dreams
programme.desc: Lori explores a potential career path after her boss suggests she has a strong future within the Burnt Bean organization.

programme.title: Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: Road Trip: Screen Queen / Road Trip: Hide and Sneak
programme.desc: When the Louds' road trip takes them to Hollywood, Lola is determined to become a star and land a leading role. // To help Mom make the deadline for her column, the Louds have to avoid the Casagrandes when they visit Great Lakes City.

programme.title: Sofa, So Good
programme.desc: The kids search all over Royal Woods to find the missing furniture they left outside while cleaning.

programme.title: Warriors Against the Realm / Sunganduel
programme.desc: Lily introduces Jack to her favorite video game, but when he keeps losing, Jack binges the game and turns into a toxic troll. // Slice of life vignettes that illustrate the modern-day family dynamic.

programme.title: Not So Fast and Furious
programme.desc: A new super-fast villain is wreaking havoc in Secret Shores, and Billy is the only hope at tracking her down. After Billy's speed accidentally triggers an avalanche, however, he decides to hang up his cape and retire from being a superhero.

programme.title: The Great Cactus Con
programme.desc: Jasper gets the chance to take his crush to Cactus Con. When a mysterious villain gets involved the entire gang is forced into action!

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦和翼无忧密谋刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，彧修明将城门大开，与民同庆，以此引出刺客。翼无忧准备借此机会刺杀彧修明，而樊如晦则派雇佣兵控制禁军以协助刺杀。同时，阿夙作为秘术师也参与其中，但在行动中被风隐发现，最终风隐被阿夙和青夙联手杀死。另一方面，棠缘离开了樊平，留下了她的孩子和一封信与樊平决别。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍接到以珈通知后赶回香港，应对方欣展开的挖角潮。一妍尝试加薪挽留不果，多达一百名医护辞职，当中还包括建邦。启澄对于被建邦背叛感震惊，二人闹翻。永成担心明塱一旦倒闭，自己的投资等于泡汤。秀琳决定改由以珈担任代主席。以珈偶然得知马来西亚医疗中心的主要投资人涉及商业诈骗，直觉是扭转局面的关键。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 昊天揭破建堃跟世祺等人合谋对付他，怒不可遏。满月收到消息指美宝被昊天捉走，找成风共襄对策，想查出昊天正在哪间医院，却一时未有所获。美宝获释回来，未被抽取骨髓。王卓代主席召开记招，称昊天病重入院后将公司暂托其打理，及后还在董事会上安排众人即席与昊天视像通话……满月成功进入医院找到昊天，却发现昊天中风，无法带他离开。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明坚持大开城门引出刺客，翼无忧和阿夙等人计划刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，翼无忧冲进皇宫，与彧修明展开生死对决，但被彧修明打败身死。同时，樊如晦的叛乱也被平定，其最终自杀身亡。彧修明和叶凌霜成婚后共同执掌朝政，修建运河，发展经济，为百姓谋求福祉。最终，彧修明的儿子继承皇位，九州大陆迎来了统一与和谐。

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: The Roots of Backcountry Skiing
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas visit Mount Assiniboine, the birthplace of backcountry skiing in North America. To better understand the sport's origins, they meet Claude Duchesne, who takes them on a journey through time.

programme.title: Black Forest
programme.desc: The chef draws inspiration from classic desserts and presents a simplified version of the Black Forest cake. Perfect for impressing guests on special occasions.

programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: The honey show
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: The council
programme.desc: Pokou, Lucio, N'zi and Ebri Morrow arrive in the camp. A few days later, all the members of the council meet before the King.

programme.title: The wheelchair
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Here's a panda
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Mise Au Point

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel
programme.desc: Danielle Mitterrand was hurt when the existence of Mazarine, Mitterrand's secret daughter, and her mother Anne Pingeot were made official. She left, fed up with her husband's secrets. At the highest level of government, emotions were running high. The President was once again faced with a crisis that was threatening his public image.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel
programme.desc: His illness was worrying and weakening Francois Mitterrand just when he had to travel to Strasbourg for the French presidency of the European Union. He nevertheless found the strength to follow through on the path he had set for himself: to pass on his message to future generations and to reconcile his two families.

programme.title: Frederique Gourdon - The Quest for the Living
programme.desc: Time's imprint lies at the heart of Frederique Gourdon's artistic exploration. After years of working with mixed media-painting, engraving, collage-she experienced a profound encounter in 2015 with paper and plant fiber.

programme.title: La Mer Au Loin
programme.desc: Nour, 27, clandestinely emigrates from Morocco to Marseille in search of a better future. With his friends, he lives off small trafficking operations and leads a marginal and festive life. When he meets Serge and Noemie, a charismatic and mysterious police officer and his wife, his existence takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Reunion, Les Nouvelles Soeurs Vanille
programme.desc: Owners of a vanilla plantation in Saint-Andre, the Appavoupoulle girls, otherwise known as the Vanilla Sisters, developed vanilla-growing on Reunion Island from the 1930s. The interwoven portraits of three women who, in their own way, continue to keep Bourbon vanilla alive and well, and support the struggle of its producers.

programme.title: Journal D'une Ambulanciere
programme.desc: Recently qualified, 26 year-old Megane is taken on by the Swiss Ambulance Rescue company in Geneva. During the Covid-19 crisis, the novice spent several months working with the 54 year-old ambulance driver, Christophe. Keeping regular notes in her journal, Megane hopes to pass on the valuable lessons she has learned.

programme.title: The Black Knight - a very annoying tale
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: The expedition
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: The sacred mask
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Lawyer
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ski goggles
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: The activity calendar
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: See you at 5 etoiles
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: The new Eden
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Mummy's Magic Cream
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Architect blues
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Veiled chameleon
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: The drought
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: etienne Moyat - A Thousand and One Reliefs
programme.desc: Etienne Moyat's creations reflect his deep respect and love for nature. A trained cabinetmaker, he produces unique, monumental pieces for high-end projects. Alongside this, he pursues an intense and instinctive painting practice.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Sikou Niakate (Mali)
programme.desc: After growing up in a squat near Paris and then in a working-class neighborhood in the 19th arrondissement, Sikou became an author and director. His work explores the fractures of identity, social class, gender and racism. Through cinema and writing, he gives a voice to those condemned to silence.

programme.title: Malia Metella
programme.desc: She's a big name in French swimming! Olympic silver medalist in Athens in 2004, multiple European and World medalist, she was for years the face of French sprinting in the pool: Malia Metella is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Diadie Dombana (Paris) / Hugues Mbenda (Marseille)
programme.desc: In the Chateau-Rouge district of Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Diadie Diombana, a self-taught chef of Malian origin, who embodies a mixed cuisine blending West African, Japanese and Latin American influences. With him, the market becomes a true laboratory of inspiration, where each ingredient is a bridge between cultures. In Marseille, Hugues Mbanda, a chef originally from Kinshasa, has a journey marked by exile and a passion for French gastronomy.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Justin Fisch, naturalist and guide in Florida
programme.desc: He figures amongst the thirty Canadians aged under 30 considered the most influential in terms of sustainable development. Justin Fisch welcomes a group for a trip by canoe-kayak through the Everglades: a forty-kilometre journey to explore the famous wetlands.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Clemence d'Ennery / Juliette Clovis / Rabanne / Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.desc: Hanuman returns from Patal Loka and faces a mighty test as Ravan strikes with a deadly blow, unleashing astral demon heads that threaten the night.

programme.title: Humane
programme.desc: HUMANE takes place over a single day, mere months after a global ecological collapse has forced world leaders to reduce the earth’s population.

programme.title: Nixon By Nixon: In His Own Words
programme.desc: This HBO Documentary shows the many sides of former president Richard Nixon, through his self-recorded private conversations in the White House from 1971 to 1973.

programme.title: Deadwood: The Movie
programme.desc: Set in 1876, when the richest gold strike in U.S. history drew a throng of restless misfits to an outlaw settlement in the Black Hills of South Dakota.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali's Greatest Fight
programme.desc: An HBO Original film that looks at Muhammad Ali's historic Supreme Court battle from behind closed doors.

programme.title: What A Girl Wants
programme.desc: Free-spirited teenager Amanda Bynes brings a breath of fresh air to the stuffy world of her long-lost father, Colin Firth.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: A sci-fi action epic about a ragtag band of humans coming together in the year 2020 to fight legions of monstrous creatures rising from the sea.

programme.title: Superman Iv: The Quest For Peace
programme.desc: Superman faces his toughest mission ever - to rid the world of all nuclear armaments but first he must win his battle against Lex Luther's new creation.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: When an executive's ex-boyfriend travels through time and brings back a 19th century nobleman, she reluctantly takes responsibility for showing him the 21st century.

programme.title: Land Of Gold
programme.desc: A truck driver finds a young Mexican American girl inside his shipping container and his life takes a turn as he tries to reunite her with her family.

programme.title: Prime Minister
programme.desc: A view inside the life of former New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦和翼无忧密谋刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，彧修明将城门大开，与民同庆，以此引出刺客。翼无忧准备借此机会刺杀彧修明，而樊如晦则派雇佣兵控制禁军以协助刺杀。同时，阿夙作为秘术师也参与其中，但在行动中被风隐发现，最终风隐被阿夙和青夙联手杀死。另一方面，棠缘离开了樊平，留下了她的孩子和一封信与樊平决别。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍接到以珈通知后赶回香港，应对方欣展开的挖角潮。一妍尝试加薪挽留不果，多达一百名医护辞职，当中还包括建邦。启澄对于被建邦背叛感震惊，二人闹翻。永成担心明塱一旦倒闭，自己的投资等于泡汤。秀琳决定改由以珈担任代主席。以珈偶然得知马来西亚医疗中心的主要投资人涉及商业诈骗，直觉是扭转局面的关键。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 昊天揭破建堃跟世祺等人合谋对付他，怒不可遏。满月收到消息指美宝被昊天捉走，找成风共襄对策，想查出昊天正在哪间医院，却一时未有所获。美宝获释回来，未被抽取骨髓。王卓代主席召开记招，称昊天病重入院后将公司暂托其打理，及后还在董事会上安排众人即席与昊天视像通话……满月成功进入医院找到昊天，却发现昊天中风，无法带他离开。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明坚持大开城门引出刺客，翼无忧和阿夙等人计划刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，翼无忧冲进皇宫，与彧修明展开生死对决，但被彧修明打败身死。同时，樊如晦的叛乱也被平定，其最终自杀身亡。彧修明和叶凌霜成婚后共同执掌朝政，修建运河，发展经济，为百姓谋求福祉。最终，彧修明的儿子继承皇位，九州大陆迎来了统一与和谐。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: After the Storm
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: Irreconcilable Differences
programme.desc: McGee's career and credibility are on the line when he investigates the deputy director for corruption. Also, Torres and Knight receive some surprising news.

programme.title: Nexus
programme.desc: As NCIS investigates a dangerous connection between the Nexus cartel and Parker's longtime nemesis, mob boss Carla Marino, the team uncovers a high-stakes plot involving stolen nuclear material. With time running out, Parker is forced into an uneasy alliance that could determine the fate of the operation - and his own future.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers S13
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon S13
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Counterbalance
programme.desc: Cobra Kai gains it's second student. Daniel has an intricate plan to get payback on Johnny. Miguel defends Samantha against Kyler during lunch break.

programme.title: Bingo, Bango, Bento!
programme.desc: The seven remaining chefs work individually to create Japanese-inspired dishes for their bento boxes; one judge oversees the chefs during the elimination challenge, while two judges blindly taste test their creations.

programme.title: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: The six remaining chefs are tasked with recreating a picture perfect dish using just the memory of a reference photo.

programme.title: Bingo, Bango, Bento!
programme.desc: The seven remaining chefs work individually to create Japanese-inspired dishes for their bento boxes; one judge oversees the chefs during the elimination challenge, while two judges blindly taste test their creations.

programme.title: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: The six remaining chefs are tasked with recreating a picture perfect dish using just the memory of a reference photo.
