programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers S13
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: Bingo, Bango, Bento!
programme.desc: The seven remaining chefs work individually to create Japanese-inspired dishes for their bento boxes; one judge oversees the chefs during the elimination challenge, while two judges blindly taste test their creations.

programme.title: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: The six remaining chefs are tasked with recreating a picture perfect dish using just the memory of a reference photo.

programme.title: Irreconcilable Differences
programme.desc: McGee's career and credibility are on the line when he investigates the deputy director for corruption. Also, Torres and Knight receive some surprising news.

programme.title: Nexus
programme.desc: As NCIS investigates a dangerous connection between the Nexus cartel and Parker's longtime nemesis, mob boss Carla Marino, the team uncovers a high-stakes plot involving stolen nuclear material. With time running out, Parker is forced into an uneasy alliance that could determine the fate of the operation - and his own future.

programme.title: No Country Is Safe
programme.desc: Their family now in danger, Tony and Ziva must find who is behind a nefarious cyber-attack.

programme.title: No Friend Of Mine
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva track down the elusive hacker, only to join forces when Interpol closes in.

programme.title: Movie: Back To The Future III (ft. Michael J. Fox & Christopher Lloyd)
programme.desc: In Back to the Future Part III, Marty travels to 1885 to save Doc from an outlaw. Packed with laughs, action, and heart, it’s the epic Wild West finale to the beloved trilogy.

programme.title: Raising the Bar-Celona
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and three trusted returnees are back for another wild charter season but when two deckies are sidelined by illness, the crew struggles to get the boat ready in time for charter. Aesha worries one of her green stews may be giving her deju vu. A crewmember damages the boat on the first night.

programme.title: Stingled Out
programme.desc: The deck team struggles to find their footing, and big mistakes are made. A stew begins to flirt with all male crewmembers on board. The chef struggles to get a handle on eccentric guest requests. Tension between two deckhands escalates to a heated argument.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: A group of wealthy socialites keep the crew busy. The stews vie for attention from the guys. Meanwhile, the deck team downfall continues as major mistakes cause chaos including a deckhand that floats out to sea on a jet ski.

programme.title: Tough Divisions
programme.desc: A group of young, entitled guests continue to cause chaos for the crew. The chef pulls together an over-the-top eight-course tasting menu that totally rocks and when the primary demands a late-night swim, it lands him and the crew in murky waters. Two deckhands have become a liability and Capt. Sandy and Nathan must figure out what to do about it.

programme.title: Let The Games Vegan
programme.desc: A massive changeover rocks the boat. A stew gets pulled in multiple and a flirty love triangle starts to heat up. The chef struggles to cater to vegan guests with particular palates and complaints.

programme.title: The Tempest
programme.desc: Bad weather rolls in suddenly and causes chaos. A crew member takes on a new role and shifts the group dynamic. Romance heats up on board, prompting jealousy and a crew member initiates a tearful breakup.

programme.title: Le Vie En Bros
programme.desc: A new crew member joins and whips the boat into shape. A bachelor charters the yacht along with his matchmaker in the hopes of finding love while at sea. A newly single crew member sends romantic possibilities spinning. The Chief Stew gives a sharp warning about a love triangle on board.

programme.title: French Kiss
programme.desc: The deck team comes under fire for being too lax on the job. The Primary gets in hot water with the women he’s dating. A promotion on the interior leaves a stew feeling envious. An unexpected hook-up sends shockwaves through the crew.

programme.title: This is Un-Peasant
programme.desc: A shocking hook-up divides the interior. During a day out at a beach club, sexual tension explodes in every direction. The charter guests insult the yacht crew. A deckhand puts a guest in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Bowing Out
programme.desc: The chef is tasked with preparing an unusual dish for dinner. The guests stay up late and cause damage around the boat during a night of fun during docking, sending the deck team into a panic. Some of the on-board romances heat up while others fizzle out.

programme.title: Crossing Lines
programme.desc: The Bosun makes a difficult choice that angers one of the deckhands. A romance that was getting serious starts to take a turn. A group of hot charter guests come aboard and one of the stews is smitten. Tensions on the deck team spill over and cause meltdowns.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kiss
programme.desc: When a crew member has to leave the boat, a secret kiss happens that sends the entire crew into a spiral. The crew visits an elite sailing team and attends a flamenco show where major epiphanies occur. A surprise visitor comes aboard that could change everything.

programme.title: The Poo-Petrator
programme.desc: A blast from the past has one of the crew members desperate to reignite an old flame. New crew configurations cause resentments to blossom. A guest leaves an unwelcome surprise in the shower, setting off a mystery within the interior.

programme.title: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Two crew members contend with whether or not to feel guilty after committing a major betrayal. Romantic entanglements on the boat get messy. A crew member returns and is shocked to discover that everything has changed.

programme.title: Break- Ups And Shake-Ups
programme.desc: A betrayal is revealed and awkwardness and confrontations follow. While a crew member is running out of time to get a second chance, a major breakup changes everything. The deck team struggles to work in the swell, which causes a huge blow up between two deckhands.

programme.title: Stricken Nuggets
programme.desc: An argument over a jet ski causes a major rift in the deck team. A long-held bromance is threatened. A heart-to-heart about commitment is interrupted and tempers flare in multiple directions.

programme.title: Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: A group of loud, brash New Yorkers board the boat and put the crew back on their heels. Bad weather keeps the boat at the dock and a considerable emergency pops up. A crew member gets injured. A long-running friendship frays.

programme.title: Baby Steps
programme.desc: The charter season comes to an end and two crew members go all in on a bad decision. A returning visitor has a pleasant surprise. Some crew members get happy endings while others exchange harsh words. For a couple of crew members, the end is just the beginning.

programme.title: Break- Ups And Shake-Ups
programme.desc: A betrayal is revealed and awkwardness and confrontations follow. While a crew member is running out of time to get a second chance, a major breakup changes everything. The deck team struggles to work in the swell, which causes a huge blow up between two deckhands.

programme.title: Stricken Nuggets
programme.desc: An argument over a jet ski causes a major rift in the deck team. A long-held bromance is threatened. A heart-to-heart about commitment is interrupted and tempers flare in multiple directions.

programme.title: Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: A group of loud, brash New Yorkers board the boat and put the crew back on their heels. Bad weather keeps the boat at the dock and a considerable emergency pops up. A crew member gets injured. A long-running friendship frays.

programme.title: Baby Steps
programme.desc: The charter season comes to an end and two crew members go all in on a bad decision. A returning visitor has a pleasant surprise. Some crew members get happy endings while others exchange harsh words. For a couple of crew members, the end is just the beginning.

programme.title: Raising the Bar-Celona
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and three trusted returnees are back for another wild charter season but when two deckies are sidelined by illness, the crew struggles to get the boat ready in time for charter. Aesha worries one of her green stews may be giving her deju vu. A crewmember damages the boat on the first night.

programme.title: Stingled Out
programme.desc: The deck team struggles to find their footing, and big mistakes are made. A stew begins to flirt with all male crewmembers on board. The chef struggles to get a handle on eccentric guest requests. Tension between two deckhands escalates to a heated argument.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: A group of wealthy socialites keep the crew busy. The stews vie for attention from the guys. Meanwhile, the deck team downfall continues as major mistakes cause chaos including a deckhand that floats out to sea on a jet ski.

programme.title: Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: The Great Queen Seondeok
programme.desc: Mun No completes Samhanjise to give it to Yu Shin, and Bi Dam tries to fight Mun No to take the books from him.

programme.title: The Great Queen Seondeok
programme.desc: The public sentiment worsens with grain prices skyrocketing, and Deok Man asks Mi Sil why the nobles are hoarding grain.

programme.title: Running Man
programme.desc: The must watch for K-Variety shows! In this "urban action variety", the hosts complete a series of obstacles and aim to eliminate each other to win.

programme.title: Running Man
programme.desc: The must watch for K-Variety shows! In this "urban action variety", the hosts complete a series of obstacles and aim to eliminate each other to win.

programme.title: 情侠追风剑
programme.desc: 正气凛然的剑客白一鹏向「冷血五祖」报仇，却遭追打至残废。数年后，一位年青人巧遇躲在洞穴里的白一鹏，白一鹏亦决定将追风剑法传授给这位坚毅的年青人，以助他向「冷血五祖」复仇。

programme.title: 女捕快
programme.desc: 故事讲述，万胜镖局总镖头陈华堂，慑于白眉道姑的威望，抚养对头人焦家的儿子炎儿，却不许其习武，炎儿遂偷练父传之「烈焰刀法」。十年后，城中出现蒙面采花大盗，女捕快泠如霜特来侦查，并将炎儿擒获；然而采花大盗，原来是陈之长子正豪，炎儿实遭陈氏父子嫁祸。炎儿越狱而逃，誓要洗脱罪名......

programme.title: 邪斗邪
programme.desc: 余腩沉溺赌海，由于欠债累累无力偿还，遂答应债主以其妻肉偿债项。事件被其妻识破，并决意离余而去。余动轻生念头，可最终自杀未遂。余遇上一名富家老伯，老伯答应给余巨额现金，只要余答应帮他娶得美人归...

programme.title: 金燕子
programme.desc: 白衣大侠和黑色醉侠同时爱上女侠金燕子。三人却联手对付江湖中的恶势力。在一场生死对决展开前，金燕子还是迟迟未能作出自己感情的抉择。

programme.title: 扭计祖宗陈梦吉
programme.desc: 华南影帝张瑛与梁天合作的清末喜剧，二人分饰师爷荒唐镜及奇人陈梦吉。陈得知荒平素极尽敛财害人之能事，遂乔扮应征仆人...

programme.title: 盗皇陵
programme.desc: 一个身手不凡的独行客与一队英姿飒爽的娘子军，合力对抗一羣张牙舞爪的土匪，成功阻止皇帝的陵墓被盗。

programme.title: 宝莲灯
programme.desc: 这是一个耳熟能详之中国民间神话故事，讲述书生刘彦昌巧遇落入凡间的圣母三娘，二人一见钟情，结下一段仙凡姻缘。但因与二郎神结怨，屡遭迫害，二郎神更将圣母压在华山底下。彦昌与圣母之子沉香长大后，闻悉生母被压华山，悲愤欲绝，藉神斧之助挫败二郎神，劈山救母。

programme.title: 龙虎少爷
programme.desc: 执到宝为武功了得的寻宝专家，因闻招九积自称有张保仔宝藏之线索，乃往赌场将其救出；招云古董商人鲁古董藏有张生前一批信札，执、招夜窃不遂，以敲碎古玩要胁，取得信札；惟信札字迹陈旧，仅认清法华寺字样；彼时适逢高僧无相下山，执遂假扮疯僧约无相谈禅，招则暗闯其房搜寻秘密...

programme.title: 包剪石沓
programme.desc: 幽默风趣的爱情喜剧，三个年青医生常开道、史瑞科、萧而可，被安排追求院长的三个女儿灵珍、灵珊、灵玲。三人以「包、剪、搥」来决定追求对象，他们的追女桥段层出不穷，用尽英雄救美、苦肉计、死缠烂打等爱情药方，却全部失灵，乌龙百出...

programme.title: 双侠
programme.desc: 宋朝康王被困于金营巨宅，四周被武林高手严密看守。两名身怀绝技的义士必须克服重重困难，完成看似不可能的任务，设法救出康王。

programme.title: 女子公寓
programme.desc: 故事背景为一幢女子公寓，房东陈太太痛恨男人，严禁男性进入，不幸，女房客却多靠男性而活；歌女尤淑文由台北飞到香港，找寻失踪的妹妹；尤经作曲家王德生介绍到居所楼上之女子公寓居住...

programme.title: 琴剑恩仇
programme.desc: 桂武和甘联珠夫妇共闯江湖、报恩仇，得女侠红姑之助，技艺大进，博得鸳鸯剑侠美名；桂甘今受红姑所托，将杀人利器「凤琴」送往家中；谁料途经飞虎寨，不慎以「凤琴」射伤少寨主，当夜琴亦为神偷盗去...

programme.title: 天使出更
programme.desc: 话说医务署发觉圣慕伦医院的医疗水准及设备大有问题，原来该院院长体弱多病，院务交陈医生主理；但陈个性主观，行事不依规章，连手下一班见习医生亦各具「特性」，时闹笑话，弄至院务混乱。院长决定聘用资深护士长进行改革...

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鹤棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门

programme.title: 饥饿游戏

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: The Great Bedtime Race
programme.desc: It's nighttime in Axle City, and Blaze and AJ stumble upon the race of their dreams: the Great Bedtime Race! But Crusher is also in the race and he won't rest until he wins. Will Blaze come out on top, or will Crusher take home the Nightlight Trophy?

programme.title: Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: Ice Cream Truck Blaze must help out in three ice cream emergencies by transforming into three epic ice cream vehicles: an Ice Cream Helicopter, an Ice Cream Submarine, and an Ice Cream Spaceship!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Reuse-It Station / The Crew Builds A Duck Bridge
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove. // After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pizza Parlor / The Crew Builds An Airport Road
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs a lot of pizzas, fast! But when Speed Meister steps in, the pups have to fix his pizza problem. // When a family can't get to the airport in time on Speed Meister's road, Rubble & Crew has to build a new road before takeoff.

programme.title: Pups Stop the Falling Space Junk / Pups Stop the Giant Cuckoo
programme.desc: When Digi & Tal's space vacuum breaks it's up to the pups to save Mayor Humdinger from falling space debris. // Humdinger's Cuckoo Clock goes out of control. Ryder and the Pups must rescue Travis and get control of the Cuckoo to save Humdinger.

programme.title: Pups Save a Hum-nata / Pups Stop the Foggy Skies
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's birthday party goes horribly awry when Marshall Kitty gets trapped inside a life-sized pinata. / Mayor Humdinger tries pushing fog into Adventure Bay, it's up to the Paw Patrol to find animals missing in the clouds and save the day.

programme.title: Adventures In Plantsitting / Andrea the Alebrije
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take care of baby flowers Bouncy Blue, Dizzy Daisy, and Baby Rosette so Isa can attend a royal tea party. / Dora and Boots help baby Andrea find the magical leaf so she can receive her Alebrije powers and take care of the rainforest.

programme.title: Little Dora's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken accidentally shrinks Dora and Boots so it's up to Dora's little brother and sister to help get them big again.

programme.title: Rocket Race
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: Parents
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Windy Autumn Day
programme.desc: It is a cold and windy day. At the park, all the leaves have turned red and yellow. It is so windy that Peppa's ball blows into the pond and George's hat blows into a tree.

programme.title: Mysteries
programme.desc: The family is watching "Detective Potato" on TV. Peppa and George want to be detectives too. So,Daddy Pig gives them a mystery to solve. Teddy is hidden and Peppa and George use a magnifying glass to follow a trail of cake crumbs to solve the mystery

programme.title: Bubbles
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing with bubbles. When the bubble mixture runs out, Daddy Pig shows them how to make really big bubbles with an old tennis racket and soapy water. Then he makes a big, muddy, bubbly puddle for everyone to jump up and down in.

programme.title: Bedtime
programme.desc: It's nearly time for bed and Peppa and George are called in for their bath. After that, they brush their teeth and get into bed. Soon they are fast asleep. Mummy and Daddy Pig finally sit down, but it's been a long day and they are very sleepy too.

programme.title: Fun and Games / King Thistle is Not Well
programme.desc: Holly gets frustrated when Ben uses his elf skills to win games. Then Ben gets frustrated when Holly uses her magic to win the games. // King Thistle needs medicine. Nanny Plum, Holly and Ben collect the ingredients for a potion to make him better.

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: Recycling Power!
programme.desc: When Axle City is visited by a littering raccoon, it's up to Blaze to save the day as a Super Recycling Truck! He cleans up the town and rescues his friends - just in time for a final showdown with the Litter Critter!

programme.title: The Mechanic Team!
programme.desc: Blaze stops into Gabby's Garage for a quick repair - just as she gets an alert! Three far-flung trucks need her mechanical know-how! So, Blaze and AJ volunteer to help her take her garage on the go!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Space Show
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: Pups Save a Space Rock / Pups Save a Good Mayor
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave. // Mayor Goodway goes missing and Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Pups Save the Bears / Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
programme.desc: Bears are asleep all over town! The PAW Patrol must work quietly to save the bears and return them to their cave. // With the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle the animals and control the chaos on the farmerless farm

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Whistling
programme.desc: Peppa tries to learn how to whistle after she realizes that seemingly everyone but her can do it.

programme.title: Doctor Hamster's Tortoise
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster the vet comes to Peppa's playgroup to show the children her pets. But Tiddles has run away. But Ms. Rabbit is going to rescue Tiddles.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Snow
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends and family are looking forward to a trip to the beach where they can make sandcastles, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow!

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Computer
programme.desc: Mummy Pig gives her old PC to Granny and Grandpa Pig. Will they be able to use it?

programme.title: Hospital
programme.desc: Peppa and her playgroup friends go with Madame Gazelle to visit Pedro Pony, who is in hospital with a broken leg.

programme.title: Spring
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig organises a chocolate egg hunt for Peppa and her friends. Will the piglets track down the treats?

programme.title: Fun and Games / King Thistle is Not Well
programme.desc: Holly gets frustrated when Ben uses his elf skills to win games. Then Ben gets frustrated when Holly uses her magic to win the games. // King Thistle needs medicine. Nanny Plum, Holly and Ben collect the ingredients for a potion to make him better.

programme.title: Pups in a Jam / Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. // Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: Pups and Katie Stop the Barking Kitty Crew!
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger disrupts Adventure Bay with his "barking" kitties, Katie and the pups must rescue the town.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasure
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨 及 世界观
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 魔音女团 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 《魔音女团》是一档TVB真人秀节目，讲述16位女艺人接受唱歌、跳舞和Rap的密集训练，并经过层层淘汰，争取组成全新女团出道的过程。

programme.title: 教煮争霸
programme.desc: 当「鼎爷」李家鼎、「三姐」萧秀香刚柔相遇，意味着一场全新的厨房大战蓄势待发！每集由嘉宾为鼎爷与三姐出题，当中包括著名厨师、识食艺人等，务求让两人以相同食材或主题，烹调出各具风格的菜式，比试同时分享煮食心得。

programme.title: 重案解密
programme.desc: 警长杜凯斌与女警严灼颖因一宗悬案而心生隔阂，其后在追查过程中冰释前嫌，并于屡次合作中建立起并肩作战的情谊。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 美食新闻报道
programme.desc: 香港汇聚环球美食，特色佳肴、贴地料理受到识饮识食之人的密切关注！黄婉曼、蔡雪莹、倪嘉雯、黄嘉雯、廖慧仪、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新饮食情报与优惠，深入了解滋味背后的故事。

programme.title: 最强生命线
programme.desc: 都市人生活节奏紧张，压力又大，身体易出毛病，《最强生命线》为你解构健康之道。每集都会邀请医学专家讲解各种疾病的成因，还有物理治疗师，运动治疗师教做适当的运动。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 又见逍遥
programme.desc: 于经典游戏《仙剑奇侠传》改编，故事讲述胸怀大侠梦想的店小二李逍遥与女娲后人赵灵儿一同历经艰难险阻，致力于寻找灵珠，勇敢地承担起拯救世界的责任。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导& 世界观 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.desc: 每晚紧贴香港娱乐圈的消息，以至世界各地的影视娱乐新闻，报道艺人最新动态、剧集和电影宣传、演唱会精华、颁奖礼盛况等，让大家瞬间掌握影视娱乐圈的动态和最新消息。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 世界观

programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick take the case of a young man who is found naked in the desert without an obvious cause of death.

programme.title: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: The audience thinks it's part of the act when the Hulk rushes on stage to save a rock star.

programme.title: Prime Time
programme.desc: When the Tanners become a Nielsen family, ALF rigs the people meter to "skew up" the ratings of his favorite shows--which causes havoc for NBC's President Brandon Tartikoff.

programme.title: Some Enchanted Evening
programme.desc: At ALF's urging, Willie hosts a Halloween costume party to impress his boss and get a better job. ALF decides to invite everyone to the scary bash becomes the celebrated figure of the evening.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: Cool Change
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: Crate 'N Burial
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit and run death of a little girl.

programme.title: Part 12
programme.desc: The war is over, the Confederacy having surrendered, freeing the slaves. But most people seem interested only in using and abusing the emancipated blacks in the same old way.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: The Controllers (Part 1)
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy formerly of the Star Trek series and guest star Dina Merrill join the Impossible Missions Force to fight a mind-destroying drug that could enslave the free world in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: The Controllers (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jim Phelps lets himself be framed for murder in a scheme to discredit a scientist who has developed a mind-destroying drug in the second of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Judge Not
programme.desc: Jessica attends the New Orleans funeral of a jazz musician and attempts to solve a 20-year-old murder that is haunting his family.

programme.title: Terminal Connection
programme.desc: Jessica attempts to prove a battered wife innocent of killing her husband after failing to convince the woman to defend herself.

programme.title: A Killing In Vegas
programme.desc: While attending a Las Vegas convention, Jessica becomes involved when the boyfriend of her editor's daughter becomes a murder suspect.

programme.title: Committee
programme.desc: After Jessica speaks at an exclusive men's club, they ask her to investigate when one of their members is murdered and they are all suspects.

programme.title: The Corsican Cousins
programme.desc: Endora's spell forces Samantha to play "Simon Says" with cousin Serena.

programme.title: Samantha's Magic Potion
programme.desc: Samantha stirs up an impotent potion to get Darrin to stir up creative juices of his own.

programme.title: Sisters at Heart
programme.desc: Lisa uses wishcraft and learns a lesson in sisterhood.

programme.title: The Mother-in-Law of the Year
programme.desc: Endora has her day and her way as-Darrin tries to sell bon bons.

programme.title: Mary the Good Fairy (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Good Fairy gets into the brandy and makes-Samantha her substitute.

programme.title: Reparations
programme.desc: Jonah Dekker comes to NYC from L.A. to defend his cousin who has been accused of rape. Meanwhile, ADA Casey Novak returns to help Benson and Stabler with the case.

programme.title: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: The audience thinks it's part of the act when the Hulk rushes on stage to save a rock star.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: Cool Change
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: Crate 'N Burial
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit and run death of a little girl.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: A Dump Of My Own
programme.desc: Al sets out to fulfill a lifelong dream when he begins construction on his very own bathroom, equipped with the legendary Ferguson Toilet.

programme.title: Her Cups Runneth Over
programme.desc: Peggy is so miserable when her favorite bra is discontinued, that Al is forced to take matters into his own hands and find a replacement.

programme.title: The Bald And The Beautiful
programme.desc: When Al and Steve face up to the bald fact that they are both losing their hair, they decide to seek the counsel and encouragement of a hairless support group.

programme.title: 铁线功夫拳
programme.desc: 习武多年的梁坤为守护心爱之人本不愿再过问江湖之事，却因此导致心爱之人惨死，梁坤也就此明白江湖的真意。他最终在丐帮长老苏灿的帮助下重返江湖，力战群寇，成功为爱人报仇雪恨。

programme.title: 见怪
programme.desc: 失明的游己任在离岛的工厂工作。一天，因飓风的破坏，工厂与外界隔绝。此时突然有一只怪物来袭，任何看到怪物的人都会化成黑影。因游己任看不见怪物，他能成功协助伙伴安全离开，更奋战反击，誓要杀死怪物！

programme.title: 女特警之暗战
programme.desc: 东州地区长期盘踞一支贩毒集团。霹雳女子突击队队员梅静率领其他队员成功攻入贩毒集团的制毒基地，却中了预先设下的埋伏，梅爸爸是犯罪集团内部的卧底身份亦随之暴露。最后，梅静与突击队员们经历一轮激战后，击败对手，并救出梅爸爸。

programme.title: 开棺
programme.desc: 消失三年的鬼手及其盗墓团伙重现江城，再次下墓摸金。怎料四名盗墓贼在开棺时遇惊魂邪煞，逃离后又接连惨死家中。最终古墓尸毒和针孔成为留给员警沈春合仅有的线索，看似普通的盗墓案，瞬间扑朔迷离疑点重重。

programme.title: 少年叶问之危机时刻
programme.desc: 1917年，少年叶问初到香港求学。英文演讲比赛当天，学校发生一宗惊天绑架案，全校同学都被挟持。面对眼前的危机，叶问挺身而出，发现绑匪竟然是自己的师父和好兄弟。少年叶问在危机时刻可否打败绑匪，从而伸张正义？

programme.title: 再见七日情
programme.desc: 护卫员阿逊被派往保护富商的儿子，期间巧遇住在隔壁的祖儿，更渐渐爱上她，却发现原来祖儿是富商的情妇。当他俩的恋情被富商发现后，事情一发不可收拾！

programme.title: 反收数特遣队
programme.desc: 在金融危机期间，绝大多数香港市民陷入债务困境。此时，贵利集团采取无情手段逼迫债务人还款，李探员与其地下部队誓言缉拿这个非法组织的头目。

programme.title: 男与女
programme.desc: 偷渡客孟思晨匿居于山边木屋区，沦为众男工具，期间结识非法拳师江远生，并发生雾水情缘。后来思晨下嫁中年木匠贵叔，生活虽安稳，心灵却空虚。意外再遇远生后，难免干柴烈火，未几更有孕...

programme.title: 九龙城寨
programme.desc: 曾是东北街头武霸的阿能为了出人头地，洗心革面来到香港的九龙城寨从零开始打拼，不料却卷入一场黑恶势力间的阴谋和混战。最终为保护被黑恶势力追杀的好朋友，阿能重拾自我，挺身而出，与城寨居民一同对抗黑恶势力，誓死保卫朋友。

programme.title: 玻璃樽
programme.desc: 台湾女孩阿不前往香港，寻找漂流玻璃樽中那封浪漫纸条的作者阿拔。谁料现实阿拔与幻想的相差甚远，让她心碎失望、决定黯然返乡。就在命运的转角，她遇上富豪企业家陈子午，就此展开一段意想不到的爱情故事。

programme.title: 百变星君
programme.desc: 富家子李泽星挂名留学，实际上却挥金如土，并自命情圣，称霸校园。一日，因搭上黑帮老大情妇Silvia，而遭黑帮刺杀，被炸得粉身碎骨。这个财大气粗的李泽星以百变金刚之姿态复活，还掌握了独特的能力，得到一份真正的工作，还有他真心爱上的意中人。

programme.title: 精武风云 - 陈真
programme.desc: 1920年代的上海，陈真以年轻实业家身份潜伏，欲揭露黑社会头目与日军的勾结。他不仅要取得头目的信任，还需应对日军将领麾下杀手的重重狙杀。为隐匿行迹，他戴起黑色面具，联手警局队长，以威猛铁拳守护这座城市的爱国志士。

programme.title: 我爱神仙遮
programme.desc: 推土车司机阿成，在工作时忽遇地陷而堕入一地下古庙，无意中成为油纸伞妖的主人。她更将自己现身的秘密及超凡的法力告知阿成。地盘工目凡叔嗜赌，欠下恶少高利贷，恶少垂涎凡叔之女美色，要凡叔以女还债；阿成得悉后请伞妖戏弄恶少，并暗助凡叔在赌场获胜，清还债项。惟此神伞之秘密却被恶少发现...

programme.title: 武松斗杀西门庆
programme.desc: 武松因发现他的嫂子潘金莲与富家子弟西门庆有染，而被西门庆设计将他流放一年，在此期间，他的哥哥武大郎不幸被杀并火化下葬。武松回家后，告上公堂，谁知县令三言两语打回状子，潦草结案。武松最终能否为哥哥报仇？

programme.title: 画魔人
programme.desc: 若为和两位闺蜜回到她儿时居住的房子，重遇一直住在那儿的表哥。他们本打算一起散散心，却频频遭遇灵异事件的侵袭，最后更变成一场惊心动魄之旅，有让人意想不到的结局。

programme.title: 风雨同路
programme.desc: 卧底探员张郎奉命接近前黑帮大哥李云飞，调查冷血匪帮首领大傻所涉及的钻石劫案，并借机套取线报。当交易出现意外后，钻石落入李云飞手中，大傻决心将两人置于死地。张郎与李云飞被迫联手反击。

programme.title: 烈探
programme.desc: 警探张荼为救落入人贩之手的儿子，不惜孤身深入敌穴，跨国追击，但却被牵扯进大型儿童拐卖案。在寻找儿子的过程中，他和身份神秘的女子携手捣毁了一个大型国际犯罪集团，上演了一场惊心动魄的绝地生死营救。

programme.title: 青木劫
programme.desc: 民国初年，富甲一方的康氏惨遭灭门，唯一的目击证人-家中的幼女-在亲眼目睹全家被杀后离奇失踪。几十年间，位于青木巷的废弃康宅充斥着灵异惊悚的气氛。随着真相逐渐揭露，这个恐怖的疑团交织着复仇与死亡的动机。

programme.title: 大上海
programme.desc: 黑帮头目成大器步步攀升至权力巅峰，却深陷两名女子的情感纠葛与特务机关的阴谋算计，并在战争逼近的威胁下挣扎求生。

programme.title: 灵幻先生
programme.desc: 江湖术士茅山明无法驱除复仇的怨灵，只得与他的鬼同伴一起逃脱。他们躲进一个村庄后，遇到了意图灭绝人类的邪恶女魔头。于是，茅山明与师父九叔携手合作，对抗这位威胁村民的魔头。他们能否战胜黑暗势力，赢得最终的胜利？

programme.title: 望夫成龙
programme.desc: 在乡间长大的情侣石金水和吴带娣青梅竹马，但娣父反对他们在一起，于是二人搬到市区共同生活。带娣为助金水找到一份推销员工作，暗中当舞小姐为其筹款。金水因工作勤奋，受上司赏识，加以提拔。虽然工作发展如意，但金水渐渐发觉自己与带娣的距离越来越远...

programme.title: 叱咤风云
programme.desc: 车王李一飞不甘于过气的事实，为了争一口气证明自己，导致同队女车手吕莉莉发生意外，他所属的车队因此陷入倒闭危机。直至一名毫无赛道经验的虚拟赛车冠军选手加入车队，他的真实赛车表现竟超出预料。三人能否一起为车队重夺曾经拥有的辉煌与光荣？

programme.title: 靓女差馆
programme.desc: 雷女警长率领的港岛东刑事侦缉组的组员全是女警，因此有「靓女差馆」之称。警员生啤和沙爹对各女警一见难忘，遂主动申请调职到靓女差馆，意图接近众女并展开追求。这时，靓女差馆收到炸弹恐吓，她们最后能化解危机吗？

programme.title: 火云邪神之修罗面具
programme.desc: 十八年前，邪恶的黑羽会潜入了老邪神西城勇的地盘，盗走了修罗面具，而利用修罗面具放出当时只是个婴儿的魔神。老邪神为了魔神日后不作恶收养了婴儿，教他好好做人，成为小邪神。小邪神最后控制了面具的力量成为老邪神的接班人，继续守护城市。

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 十万火急
programme.desc: 这是关于香港消防员的英勇救火故事。勇敢的消防员无惧冲天大火，肩负救灾扶危的重任，甚至舍身救人。但当消防员脱下制服后，是否仍同样勇敢地面对自身的难题呢？

programme.title: 冰封侠之时空行者
programme.desc: 《冰封侠：时空行者》承接前作，四位明朝锦衣卫在现代香港苏醒。为修正历史，贺英独自踏上了寻找「时空金球」的凶险旅程，却不知自己正一步步堕入精心布下的致命陷阱。

programme.title: 贼王之王
programme.desc: 两名私家侦探欲藉破一连环大劫案而声名大噪。岂料调查过程中竟一再被贼王使计愚弄，笑话连篇。及后更发现原来所有劫案均与日商宫本有关，到底谁才是真正的贼王之王？

programme.desc: The story continues for Sam and Jay as they run their Woodstone B&B and restaurant, navigate the ghosts' daytoday antics, and deal with new life challenges.

programme.title: Episode 14
programme.desc: The $100,000 Pyramid Season 8 continues Michael Strahan's hosting, featuring celebrity pairs alongside contestants playing classic wordassociation rounds to reach the $100,000 Winner's Circle

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: Mickey Fox, a sheriff in Edgewater and stepsister of Cal Fire’s division chief Sharon Leone, must balance the demands of law enforcement with the complexities of motherhood, politics and a past that won’t stay buried.

programme.title: Best Man
programme.desc: Bode Leone works alongside elite firefighters from Cal Fire and former friends, battling largescale wildfires while navigating his complex past and personal relationships.

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 健康2.0
programme.desc: 您对自己的身体了解多少？怎么样吃才能吃出健康和美丽？网络上的健康秘方到底是真是假？主持人郑凯云、江坤俊医师与韦汝将为您的健康把关！

programme.title: 少康战情室
programme.desc: 节目内容包含时事评论与当天的突发新闻议题，以赵少康为主持的政论节目。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: 食尚玩家: 我们这一家
programme.desc: 《我们这一家》以三世代同游同食为主轴，走访在地美食，透过不同价值观的碰撞与理解，用吃喝玩乐串起世代故事

programme.title: 整点新闻
programme.desc: 本新闻时段除了在第一时间为观众提供深入的直击报导外，还提供详细的世界头条新闻、两岸三地要闻、台湾焦点新闻，让您的新闻信息零时差。
